title: aleisanthia rupestris
intro: Aleisanthia rupestris, also known as the rock aleisanthia, is a plant species belonging to the family Rubiaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Aleisanthia rupestris include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and combat infections. Aleisanthia rupestris can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures for its medicinal uses.
